query:
-- Check workbook line items for UCXcel Webex Basic - look at quantity, unit price, total
SELECT 
  li.id, li.productName, li.productType, li.quantity, li.unitPrice, li.totalPrice,
  li.matchedServiceExternalId, li.customerName,
  wu.importedAt
FROM supplier_workbook_line_items li
JOIN supplier_workbook_uploads wu ON wu.id = li.uploadId
WHERE wu.supplier = 'SasBoss'
  AND LOWER(li.productName) LIKE '%ucxcel webex basic%'
ORDER BY wu.importedAt DESC, li.totalPrice DESC
LIMIT 10;
